mnemonics.title: Order of Evaluation
mnemonics.content: **P**lease **E**xcuse **M**y **D**ear **A**unt **S**ally (Parentheses, Exponents, Multiplication, Division, Addition, Subtraction) is for infix. For stack-based postfix, remember: **L**ook **O**perand? **P**ush. **O**perator? **P**op, **P**op, **C**ompute, **P**ush. (LOPPPCP)
